sources.title: Linear redesign writing
sources.borrowed: High-density alignment, tight row rhythm, and low-noise emphasis.
sources.rejected: Any treatment that would make the hub desk feel consumer-lightweight rather than operational.

sources.title: Linear custom views
sources.borrowed: Saved-view framing and fast filter posture.
sources.rejected: User-local arbitrary resort or personal ordering that would fight the authoritative queue.

sources.title: Carbon data table guidance
sources.borrowed: Consistent row rhythm, restrained toolbar actions, and scan-first density.
sources.rejected: Heavy table chrome and sorting metaphors that imply browser-side rank control.

sources.title: WAI-ARIA grid pattern
sources.borrowed: Clear keyboard structure expectations for dense operational layouts.
sources.rejected: Fake grid semantics for a surface that is better expressed as an ordered work list plus articles.

sources.title: WAI-ARIA listbox pattern
sources.borrowed: Selected-anchor clarity and explicit keyboard focus planning.
sources.rejected: Single-widget selection semantics that would hide the richer row controls.

sources.title: WAI-ARIA disclosure pattern
sources.borrowed: One expanded option card at a time with clear revealed detail.
sources.rejected: Nested disclosure stacks that bury the dominant action.

sources.title: WCAG 2.2 use of color
sources.borrowed: Risk, trust, and freshness always reinforced by text.

sources.title: WCAG 2.2 focus not obscured
sources.borrowed: Focus visibility for selected queue rows, option cards, and the dominant dock action.
sources.rejected: Sticky chrome that clips or hides focused controls.

sources.title: Playwright best practices
sources.borrowed: Stable data markers, behaviour-led assertions, and trace-first failure posture.

sources.title: Playwright browser contexts
sources.borrowed: Fresh contexts for visual and reduced-motion proofs.

sources.title: Playwright ARIA snapshots
sources.borrowed: Snapshotting normal, drift, and callback-visible states.
sources.rejected: Accessibility assertions that only read color or screenshots.

sources.title: Playwright visual comparisons
sources.borrowed: Desktop, tablet, and mission-stack proof coverage.

sources.title: Core Web Vitals
sources.borrowed: Avoiding decorative chart clutter and keeping dense queue rendering lightweight.
sources.rejected: Dashboard vanity panels that add noise without helping action.
